summary: Frontend-only validation completed for builder section hover controls and color auto-correction logic. All requested features working correctly: controls hidden by default and visible on hover/selection with smooth opacity transitions, dark floating control bar has readable light text contrast, and color picker auto-corrects text color when background changes to maintain readability.
critical_code_review_comments: Console warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in SectionRenderer - recommend fixing for React best practices
SortableCanvasSection.jsx: controlsVisibilityClassName implementation is clean with proper opacity (0->1) and transform transitions
BuilderPage.jsx: ensureReadableTextColor() correctly uses WCAG contrast ratio threshold (3.2) and returns appropriate light/dark color based on background luminance
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested URL: https://quick-site-builder.stage-preview.emergentagent.com. Verified: (1) Section controls hidden by default (opacity 0), (2) Controls appear on hover (opacity 1 with smooth transition), (3) Controls visible when section selected (opacity 1), (4) Move button text: rgb(244, 244, 245) on rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1) - readable, (5) Duplicate/Delete buttons: rgb(228, 228, 231) - readable on dark bg, (6) Color auto-correction: white bg -> dark text (#09090B), dark bg -> light text (#FAFAFA), unreadable text auto-corrected, (7) Auth -> Dashboard -> Builder flow works without regressions.

details: Controls opacity 0 when section not hovered/selected
Controls opacity 1 on hover with 200ms transition
Controls fully visible (opacity 1) when section selected
Move button: text rgb(244,244,245) on rgba(255,255,255,0.1) bg - good contrast
Control bar bg: bg-[#0b1223d4] with backdrop-blur - dark semi-transparent
Unreadable text (white on white) -> auto-corrected to #09090b
Unreadable text (dark on dark) -> auto-corrected to #FAFAFA
